properties.name: San Rafael Swell
properties.description: Massive dome-shaped uplift exposing ancient rock formations across central Emery County

properties.name: Book Cliffs
properties.description: 2,000-foot escarpment stretching across northern Emery County, forming the southern boundary of the Uinta Basin

properties.name: Castle Valley & Settlement Corridor
properties.description: Main settlement and agricultural region of Emery County, including Castle Dale, Ferron, Orangeville, and surrounding communities

properties.name: Goblin Valley & Hoodoos
properties.description: Surreal badlands landscape of mushroom-shaped hoodoos eroded from Entrada Sandstone in southern Emery County

properties.name: Huntington Canyon & Water Sources
properties.description: High elevation canyon drainage system providing water to Huntington and northern Emery County communities

properties.name: Coal & Uranium Mining Districts
properties.description: Historic mining districts including Sego Ghost Town and Temple Mountain uranium mining area

properties.name: Green River Gateway
properties.description: Gateway town to the San Rafael Swell and Colorado River recreation areas, eastern entry point to Emery County
